question: Why do all websites look exactly the same now with massive text and boring colors?
author: Sam
answerText: It is because most people just use templates now. Check out [WordPress](https://wordpress.com/), it powers half the web and uses standard themes.

question: Why do all websites look exactly the same now with massive text and boring colors?
author: Mia
answerText: Actually, it is for ease of use. When things look the same, people know how to click them without thinking.

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost, where do I actually start?
author: Dave
answerText: Do not panic! I highly recommend starting with [Codecademy](https://www.codecademy.com/). It lets you type code right in your browser.

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost, where do I actually start?
author: Sarah
answerText: I was stuck too. What helped me was making a simple text game. Just build something tiny!

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost, where do I actually start?
author: Leo
answerText: Watch one beginner video and stop searching. Too many choices will just confuse you.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple notebook? I feel like learning it is a full-time job.
author: Jen
answerText: I gave up on it. A paper notebook never runs out of battery. Just use what works for you.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple notebook? I feel like learning it is a full-time job.
author: Chris
answerText: It is amazing if you need to share things. I recommend watching [Thomas Frank](https://thomasjfrank.com/) on YouTube, he explains it perfectly.

question: My budget is $50, what is the best mouse I can get for my office? My hand is cramping.
author: Mike
answerText: For exactly that price, I recommend the [Logitech Pebble](https://www.logitech.com/). It is small, quiet, and very smooth.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about dog food and saw an ad for it!
author: Anna
answerText: They are not listening to your voice, they are just tracking what you search and where you go. It is creepy but normal.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about dog food and saw an ad for it!
author: Tom
answerText: In my experience, if you turn off microphone access in your settings, you will feel a lot better. Check out [Privacy Guides](https://www.privacyguides.org/) for simple tips.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about dog food and saw an ad for it!
author: Jess
answerText: I totally think they listen. I never searched for dog food in my life!

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about dog food and saw an ad for it!
author: Rick
answerText: It is just a coincidence mixed with very smart math. Advertisers know you better than you know yourself.

question: Will ChatGPT actually take my job or is it just hype? I am an office assistant and I am freaking out.
I keep getting stuck trying to put a picture exactly in the middle of my website. Why is HTML so hard?
author: Paul
answerText: Try using [Flexbox](https://css-tricks.com/snippets/css/a-guide-to-flexbox/), it is a total game changer for placing things.

question: Why does every single app want me to make an account just to read one page?
author: Nina
answerText: They want your email so they can sell you stuff.

question: Why does every single app want me to make an account just to read one page?
author: Greg
answerText: Just use [10 Minute Mail](https://10minutemail.com/) if you do not want to give them your real email.

question: Why does every single app want me to make an account just to read one page?
author: Fiona
answerText: It is super annoying. I just close the page right away.

question: My laptop is 5 years old and takes ten minutes to turn on. Do I need to buy a new one?
author: Omar
answerText: No! Just buy a cheap Solid State Drive. It will run like brand new.

question: My laptop is 5 years old and takes ten minutes to turn on. Do I need to buy a new one?
author: Lucy
answerText: In my experience, if it is over 5 years old, it might be time to check out [Best Buy](https://www.bestbuy.com/) for a basic new model.

question: Does clearing your browser cache actually do anything or is it a myth?
author: Evan
answerText: Yes, it deletes old files that might be broken. It usually fixes weird website glitches for me.

question: I have tried ten different to-do apps and I always quit using them. What is wrong with me?
author: Cara
answerText: Nothing is wrong with you! Apps can be too much work.

question: I have tried ten different to-do apps and I always quit using them. What is wrong with me?
author: Seth
answerText: Try using just a sticky note on your desk.

question: I have tried ten different to-do apps and I always quit using them. What is wrong with me?
author: Maya
answerText: I recommend [Todoist](https://todoist.com/), it is the only one that stuck for me because it is so plain.

question: I have tried ten different to-do apps and I always quit using them. What is wrong with me?
author: Luke
answerText: You might be trying to plan too much at once. Just write down three things a day.

question: Is using AI to make art actually considered real art? Just curious what people think.
author: Zoe
answerText: It is more like telling an artist what to paint. You are the director, not the painter.

question: Is using AI to make art actually considered real art? Just curious what people think.
author: Ryan
answerText: I do not think so, but tools like [Midjourney](https://www.midjourney.com/) are still really fun to play with.

question: Where did all the scrollbars go on modern websites? I can never tell how long a page is anymore!
Do I need to be really good at math to learn how to code? I am terrible at numbers.
author: Tess
answerText: Not at all! Most coding is just logic and moving words around.

question: Do I need to be really good at math to learn how to code? I am terrible at numbers.
author: Alan
answerText: Unless you are making 3D games or AI, basic math is totally fine. Check out [freeCodeCamp](https://www.freecodecamp.org/) to see how simple it starts.

question: Should I get a Mac or a PC for college? I mostly just type papers and watch videos.
author: Jill
answerText: Get a cheap PC. You do not need a Mac just to write papers.

question: Should I get a Mac or a PC for college? I mostly just type papers and watch videos.
author: Mark
answerText: A MacBook Air is amazing because the battery lasts all day. Look at the student discounts on [Apple](https://www.apple.com/).

question: Should I get a Mac or a PC for college? I mostly just type papers and watch videos.
author: Emma
answerText: Honestly, a simple Chromebook might be all you need!

question: What is the best shared calendar for a really busy family? We keep missing appointments.
author: Beth
answerText: I highly recommend [Google Calendar](https://calendar.google.com/). You can color code everything for each kid.

question: Are those free VPN apps actually safe to use? I want to watch a show from another country.
author: Cole
answerText: If it is free, you are the product. They might be selling your data.

question: Are those free VPN apps actually safe to use? I want to watch a show from another country.
author: Dana
answerText: Pay for a cheap one instead. I use [Mullvad](https://mullvad.net/) and it is very safe.

question: Every time I ask AI to write an email for me, it sounds totally fake. How do I fix this?
author: Sean
answerText: Tell it to write like a normal person and stop using big words.

question: Every time I ask AI to write an email for me, it sounds totally fake. How do I fix this?
author: Erin
answerText: I always write my own messy email first, then ask the AI to just fix my spelling.

question: Every time I ask AI to write an email for me, it sounds totally fake. How do I fix this?
author: Kyle
answerText: Check out [Grammarly](https://www.grammarly.com/), it helps you write better without sounding like a robot.

question: Why are the words on websites getting so huge? I feel like I am reading a children book.
author: Jane
answerText: Mostly because everyone uses their phones now, so text has to be big enough to tap on.

question: I am 40 years old. Is it too late to learn how to make websites?
author: Bill
answerText: Never! I started at 45 and now I do it for a living.

question: I am 40 years old. Is it too late to learn how to make websites?
author: Rose
answerText: Age does not matter at all. The computer does not care how old you are.

question: I am 40 years old. Is it too late to learn how to make websites?
author: Gary
answerText: Try out [The Odin Project](https://www.theodinproject.com/), it is completely free and walks you through everything.

question: I am 40 years old. Is it too late to learn how to make websites?
author: Lynn
answerText: It might take a bit longer to learn, but you have life experience that younger people do not have.

question: I love the sound of loud keyboards but my family hates it. Is there a quiet one that still feels good?
author: Noah
answerText: Look for keyboards with brown or red switches. They feel nice but do not click loudly.

question: I love the sound of loud keyboards but my family hates it. Is there a quiet one that still feels good?
author: Leah
answerText: I recommend the [Keychron](https://www.keychron.com/) boards. You can pick quiet keys when you buy it.

question: Evernote got too expensive. What is a free note app that is actually good?
author: Adam
answerText: Just use Apple Notes if you have an iPhone. It is perfectly fine.

question: Evernote got too expensive. What is a free note app that is actually good?
author: Ruth
answerText: I moved all my stuff to [Joplin](https://joplinapp.org/). It is completely free and works exactly the same.

question: Evernote got too expensive. What is a free note app that is actually good?
author: Drew
answerText: Google Keep is great for quick little notes.

question: Does opening a private window actually hide what I am doing from my internet provider?
author: Troy
answerText: No! It only hides it from other people who use your exact computer.

question: Does opening a private window actually hide what I am doing from my internet provider?
author: Gail
answerText: Your internet company can still see everything. You would need a VPN to hide it from them.

question: Can I just copy my whole resume into ChatGPT and ask it to make it better?
author: Cody
answerText: Yes, but make sure you remove your phone number and address first just to be safe!

question: I absolutely hate the new video updates on social media. Why is everything turning into TikTok?
I am learning code. What exactly is Github and why does everyone say I need it?
author: Dean
answerText: It is basically Google Drive for code. It saves a history of your work so you never lose it.

question: I am learning code. What exactly is Github and why does everyone say I need it?
author: Faye
answerText: It is a place to show off your projects to get a job. Make a free account at [GitHub](https://github.com/) and just click around.

question: I am working from home. Should I buy wireless headphones or are wired ones better?
author: John
answerText: Get wireless! Being able to walk to the kitchen during a boring meeting is the best.

question: I am working from home. Should I buy wireless headphones or are wired ones better?
author: Mary
answerText: Wired ones never run out of battery. I hate charging my headphones.

question: I am working from home. Should I buy wireless headphones or are wired ones better?
author: Carl
answerText: I recommend [Sony](https://www.sony.com/) wireless headphones, the battery lasts for days.

question: How do I actually stop looking at my phone while I am trying to work?
author: Tina
answerText: Put it in another room. Seriously, just walk away from it.

question: How do I actually stop looking at my phone while I am trying to work?
author: Zack
answerText: There is a cool app called [Forest](https://www.forestapp.cc/) that grows a virtual tree when you leave your phone alone.

question: Every website asks me to accept cookies. Should I actually care about this?
author: Ella
answerText: Usually it is fine. They just use it to remember you or track what you look at. Just hit accept if you are in a hurry.

question: Is using AI tools to make graphics basically stealing from real artists?
author: Pete
answerText: That is a huge debate right now. The AI did learn by looking at millions of real drawings.

question: Is using AI tools to make graphics basically stealing from real artists?
author: Lori
answerText: I think of it as inspiration, just like a human artist looks at other art.

question: Is using AI tools to make graphics basically stealing from real artists?
author: Hank
answerText: If you are making money from it, it feels a bit wrong.

question: Is using AI tools to make graphics basically stealing from real artists?
author: Cara
answerText: You can read more about the legal fights on [The Verge](https://www.theverge.com/). It is super complicated.

question: Why do apps ask me to rate them five seconds after I open them for the first time?
author: Vera
answerText: It is a lazy way to get good reviews before you find any bugs.

question: Why do apps ask me to rate them five seconds after I open them for the first time?
author: Stan
answerText: I always click no. If they bother me twice, I delete them.

question: I am about to put my first website on the internet and I am terrified. What if people hack it?
author: Kurt
answerText: Nobody is going to find it unless you tell them about it! Do not worry.

question: I am about to put my first website on the internet and I am terrified. What if people hack it?
author: Lisa
answerText: If it is just simple text and pictures, there is nothing to hack. Try hosting it for free on [Netlify](https://www.netlify.com/).

question: Is getting a second screen for my computer actually worth the money?
author: Phil
answerText: Yes. It will completely change your life. You can never go back.

question: Is getting a second screen for my computer actually worth the money?
author: Ruby
answerText: I put my email on one screen and my work on the other. It is amazing.

question: Is getting a second screen for my computer actually worth the money?
author: Doug
answerText: You do not even need an expensive one. Find a cheap used screen on [eBay](https://www.ebay.com/).

question: Working for 25 minutes and taking a 5 minute break feels so dumb to me. Am I doing it wrong?
author: Nina
answerText: That method does not work for everyone. If you are focused, just keep working! Do not let a timer stop you.

question: People say to use a password manager, but what if that gets hacked? Then they have everything!
author: Jake
answerText: That is a scary thought, but they are built like a giant bank vault. It is much safer than using the same password everywhere.

question: People say to use a password manager, but what if that gets hacked? Then they have everything!
author: Tara
answerText: I recommend [Bitwarden](https://bitwarden.com/). It is free and highly trusted by experts.

question: Can I use AI to figure out what to cook for dinner with just the random stuff in my fridge?
author: Eric
answerText: Yes! I do this all the time. Just list your ingredients and ask for a simple recipe.

question: Can I use AI to figure out what to cook for dinner with just the random stuff in my fridge?
author: Mona
answerText: It is surprisingly good at baking recipes too.

question: Can I use AI to figure out what to cook for dinner with just the random stuff in my fridge?
author: Gwen
answerText: Check out [SuperCook](https://www.supercook.com/), it is a website specifically made for doing exactly this!

question: Why is it so hard to find the actual movie categories on TV streaming menus now?
author: Joel
answerText: They want to force you to look at their original shows first. It is totally on purpose.

question: Are those three-month coding schools actually legit or just a scam to take my money?
My back hurts from sitting. Is a standing desk actually worth it?
author: Burt
answerText: Yes, but you need a soft mat to stand on or your feet will hurt instead.

question: My back hurts from sitting. Is a standing desk actually worth it?
author: Cora
answerText: I got one and I never stand up. It just became an expensive normal desk.

question: My back hurts from sitting. Is a standing desk actually worth it?
author: Walt
answerText: I totally recommend [IKEA](https://www.ikea.com/) for cheap ones that use a crank handle.

question: My back hurts from sitting. Is a standing desk actually worth it?
author: Judy
answerText: Mix it up! Stand for an hour, sit for an hour.

question: Is having zero unread emails actually possible or do people just lie about it?
author: Brad
answerText: I just select all and mark as read. Boom, zero emails.

question: Is having zero unread emails actually possible or do people just lie about it?
author: Lana
answerText: It takes a lot of daily work. Unsubscribing from junk is the real secret.

question: Is it really that dangerous to use the free wifi at a coffee shop?
author: Neil
answerText: Not as much as it used to be, since most websites use secure locks now.

question: Is it really that dangerous to use the free wifi at a coffee shop?
author: Olga
answerText: If you are checking your bank account, use your phone data instead.

question: What is a safe tool to help me rewrite angry emails so I do not get fired?
author: Wade
answerText: Put it in [GoblinTools](https://goblin.tools/). They have a feature that changes the tone of your text to make it polite!

question: Why are car companies putting climate controls on touch screens? It feels so dangerous.
author: Toby
answerText: Screens are cheaper to build than a bunch of plastic buttons.

question: Why are car companies putting climate controls on touch screens? It feels so dangerous.
author: Katy
answerText: I completely agree. I have to take my eyes off the road just to turn on the heater.

question: Why are car companies putting climate controls on touch screens? It feels so dangerous.
author: Leon
answerText: Some car makers are finally bringing buttons back because everyone complained.

question: I copy code from tutorials and it works, but I feel like I learn nothing. How do I stop?
author: Ivan
answerText: Type it out by hand. Even if you are copying, typing makes your brain remember it better.

question: I copy code from tutorials and it works, but I feel like I learn nothing. How do I stop?
author: Gina
answerText: Try to change one small thing about the code after you copy it.

question: My office is really dark and I look terrible on Zoom. What is a cheap way to fix this?
author: Rudy
answerText: Do not buy a new camera! Just buy a cheap desk lamp and point it at the wall behind your computer.

question: My office is really dark and I look terrible on Zoom. What is a cheap way to fix this?
author: Faye
answerText: A cheap ring light from [Amazon](https://www.amazon.com/) works wonders for bad lighting.

question: I have too many ideas in my head. Is there an easy app to draw out my thoughts?
author: Hugo
answerText: I highly recommend [Miro](https://miro.com/). It is basically a giant digital whiteboard you can draw all over.

question: Why do some unsubscribe buttons at the bottom of emails just take me to an error page?
Will AI eventually just write all the code and make programmers useless?
author: Alex
answerText: It will just write the boring parts. We will still need humans to figure out what actually needs to be built.

question: Will AI eventually just write all the code and make programmers useless?
author: Dawn
answerText: Coding is mostly problem-solving. The AI is just a really fast typing assistant.

question: Those tests that make you click on crosswalks to prove you are human are getting impossible.
author: Ross
answerText: I swear I clicked all the bicycles but it still failed me!

question: Those tests that make you click on crosswalks to prove you are human are getting impossible.
author: Macy
answerText: It is because robots are getting smarter, so the tests have to get harder.

question: Those tests that make you click on crosswalks to prove you are human are getting impossible.
author: Kirk
answerText: I read an article on [Wired](https://www.wired.com/) about this. We are actually training their self-driving cars for free.

question: Why do programmers argue so much about using the tab key versus the space bar?
author: Owen
answerText: It is just an old joke at this point. Use whatever you like!

question: Why do programmers argue so much about using the tab key versus the space bar?
author: Vicky
answerText: Spaces look the same on every computer, while tabs can look messy. But modern editors fix it for you anyway.

question: Why do all websites look exactly the same now? It is just big pictures and large text everywhere.
author: Dave123
answerText: I think it is because most people use phones now. Big text and pictures are much easier to tap on a small screen.

question: Why do all websites look exactly the same now? It is just big pictures and large text everywhere.
author: WebFan
answerText: A lot of people just use website builders like [Squarespace](https://www.squarespace.com/) which give everyone the exact same basic templates.

question: Why do all websites look exactly the same now? It is just big pictures and large text everywhere.
author: DesignNerd
answerText: It is actually about making things easy to read quickly. When websites look similar, people do not have to learn how to use them every single time.

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost. Where do I actually start without getting confused?
author: CodeNewbie
answerText: I was stuck too! I highly recommend [Codecademy](https://www.codecademy.com/). It lets you type code right in your web browser so you do not have to install anything complicated.

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost. Where do I actually start without getting confused?
author: PythonPro
answerText: Start by trying to fix one small problem in your daily life. Do not try to build a huge video game on day one.

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost. Where do I actually start without getting confused?
author: SarahJ
answerText: Check this out: YouTube has amazing free videos. Just search for Python for absolute beginners. Watching someone else do it really helps.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
author: PaperLover
answerText: Honestly, no. A plain paper notebook never runs out of battery and it does not distract you with internet notifications.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
author: NotionFan
answerText: It depends on what you need! I use [Notion](https://www.notion.so/) because I can search for words easily. You cannot use a search bar on a piece of paper.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
author: BusyMom
answerText: I tried it and gave up. It felt like I was spending more time organizing my tasks than actually doing them.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
author: TechStudent
answerText: In my experience, it is great if you use a free template someone else already made. Do not build it from scratch.

question: My budget is 50 dollars. What is the absolute best computer mouse I can get for my office job?
author: MouseGuy
answerText: I recommend the Logitech M720. It is usually under 50 dollars and you can connect it to different computers with one button.

question: My budget is 50 dollars. What is the absolute best computer mouse I can get for my office job?
author: OfficeWorker
answerText: Actually, just get a basic wired mouse. They never die, never need batteries, and cost like 10 bucks on [Amazon](https://www.amazon.com/).

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
author: TechTruth
answerText: In my experience, they are not actually recording your voice. They just track what you search for and where you travel. It is creepy but they are not listening to your actual words.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
author: PrivacyFirst
answerText: You can turn off microphone access for apps in your phone settings if you are worried! It helps give you some peace of mind.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
author: AdGuy
answerText: It is usually just a coincidence. You probably searched for something similar recently or your friend searched for it while you were on the same Wi-Fi.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
author: SafeWeb
answerText: If you want to stop the ads, check out the [Brave Browser](https://brave.com/). It blocks a lot of those creepy trackers automatically.

question: Will ChatGPT actually take my job or is it just hype? I work in answering customer service emails.
Why do websites hide the menu behind those three little horizontal lines? I can never find anything.
author: PhoneUser
answerText: That is called a hamburger menu! Designers use it to save space on small screens so the page does not look messy.

question: Why do websites hide the menu behind those three little horizontal lines? I can never find anything.
author: OldSchool
answerText: I hate it too. I prefer when all the buttons are just at the top of the page so I know exactly where to click.

question: I spilled a whole glass of water on my laptop keyboard. I turned it off. What do I do right now?!
author: FixItFelix
answerText: Keep it turned off! Do not turn it on to check if it works. Unplug it and lay it open face down on a towel for at least two days.

question: I spilled a whole glass of water on my laptop keyboard. I turned it off. What do I do right now?!
author: TechSupport
answerText: If you can easily take the battery out, do that immediately. But most new laptops do not let you do that, so just let it dry completely.

question: I spilled a whole glass of water on my laptop keyboard. I turned it off. What do I do right now?!
author: RiceMyth
answerText: Whatever you do, do not put it in rice! Rice dust can get inside and ruin the fans. You can read why on [iFixit](https://www.ifixit.com/).

question: I have 500 unread emails and the number keeps growing. How do I fix this without deleting everything?
author: InboxZero
answerText: Search for the word unsubscribe and delete all those automatic emails first. That will clear out half of your inbox right away.

question: I have 500 unread emails and the number keeps growing. How do I fix this without deleting everything?
author: BusyWorker
answerText: I recommend putting all of your older emails into a folder called Archive. They are not deleted, so you can still search for them later, but your main screen will be clean.

question: I have 500 unread emails and the number keeps growing. How do I fix this without deleting everything?
author: LazyGenius
answerText: Honestly, just ignore the number. If it is really important, the person will email you again.

question: What is the best programming language to learn if I want to make a simple iPhone game?
author: GameDev
answerText: If you only want it on iPhone, look into Swift. It is made by Apple specifically for their phones.

question: What is the best programming language to learn if I want to make a simple iPhone game?
author: UnityFan
answerText: I highly recommend using [Unity](https://unity.com/). You learn C# with it, and it lets you put your game on iPhone and Android at the same time.

question: I clicked a link in a random text message about a package delivery. Did I just ruin my phone?
author: SecurityPro
answerText: If you just clicked the link but did not type in any passwords or download anything, you are probably fine. Just close the page.

question: I clicked a link in a random text message about a package delivery. Did I just ruin my phone?
author: ScamHater
answerText: Never put your credit card info into those sites! That is how they steal your money. They trick you into paying a tiny delivery fee.

question: How does an AI actually generate a picture from just a few words? It feels like magic.
author: AI_Nerd
answerText: It looked at millions of pictures on the internet and learned what things look like. When you say cat, it remembers the pattern of a cat from all those photos.

question: How does an AI actually generate a picture from just a few words? It feels like magic.
author: SimpleScience
answerText: Think of it like a very fast artist who has memorized every drawing in the world and tries to blend them together based on your instructions.

question: Dark mode is actually terrible for reading long articles. Am I the only one who thinks this?
author: SammyG
answerText: I completely agree! My eyes hurt so much when reading bright white text on a super black background.

question: Dark mode is actually terrible for reading long articles. Am I the only one who thinks this?
author: TechFan
answerText: Actually, dark mode saves battery on newer phone screens. But yes, it can make you squint if you read for too long.

question: Dark mode is actually terrible for reading long articles. Am I the only one who thinks this?
author: DesignPro
answerText: It is all about the gray tones. Good dark mode uses dark gray, not pure black. Check out the [Material Design Guide](https://m3.material.io/) to see how they fix this.

question: What is the difference between a cheap 5 dollar TV cable and an expensive 50 dollar one?
author: TVGuy
answerText: For regular digital cables like HDMI, there is absolutely no difference in picture quality. It either works or it does not. Save your money.

question: What is the difference between a cheap 5 dollar TV cable and an expensive 50 dollar one?
author: GamerDude
answerText: In my experience, the only difference is how strong the cord is. Cheap ones might break if you bend them too much, but the picture is the exact same.

question: I need a simple app to share a grocery list with my wife. What do you all use?
author: FamilyMan
answerText: We just use the Notes app that comes on the iPhone. You can share it and both people can check things off.

question: I need a simple app to share a grocery list with my wife. What do you all use?
author: ListLover
answerText: I recommend [AnyList](https://www.anylist.com/). It automatically sorts your food into categories like dairy and produce so you walk through the store faster.

question: I need a simple app to share a grocery list with my wife. What do you all use?
author: GoogleFan
answerText: Google Keep is amazing for this. It is totally free and works even if one of you has an Android and the other has an iPhone.

question: Learning to code is a total waste of time now that AI can write it for you. Right?
author: CodeVeteran
answerText: Not at all. AI is like a fancy calculator. It can do the math, but you still need to know what numbers to type in to get the right answer.

question: Learning to code is a total waste of time now that AI can write it for you. Right?
author: TechRealist
answerText: AI makes a lot of mistakes. If you do not know how to code, you will not know how to fix the broken code it gives you.

question: What is the easiest password manager for someone who is terrible with computers?
author: SafeTech
answerText: I recommend [Bitwarden](https://bitwarden.com/). It is free, very secure, and works on your phone and computer without being confusing.

question: What is the easiest password manager for someone who is terrible with computers?
author: AppleUser
answerText: If you only use Apple devices, just use the built-in iCloud Keychain. It saves everything automatically and you just use your fingerprint or face to log in.

question: I have to build a website for my mom's bakery by Friday and I have no clue where to start. Help!
author: HelpfulDesigner
answerText: Do not panic! Use a template. Just get [Wix](https://www.wix.com/), pick a food template, change the words, and add some nice photos of her bread.

question: I have to build a website for my mom's bakery by Friday and I have no clue where to start. Help!
author: BizOwner
answerText: Honestly, a lot of small shops just use a Facebook page or Instagram now instead of a full website. It is much faster to set up.

question: I want to use AI to help me write better business emails. Is there a free tool that is good?
author: EmailPro
answerText: Just use the free version of ChatGPT! You can paste your messy thoughts and ask it to make it sound professional.

question: I want to use AI to help me write better business emails. Is there a free tool that is good?
author: GrammarFan
answerText: I highly recommend [Grammarly](https://www.grammarly.com/). It fixes your spelling and tone right inside your email window without you having to open a new tab.

question: I want to buy my dad a tablet just for reading the morning news. iPad or a cheap Amazon tablet?
author: Daughter22
answerText: Get an iPad if you can afford it. It will last five times longer without getting slow, and it is much easier for older folks to use.

question: I want to buy my dad a tablet just for reading the morning news. iPad or a cheap Amazon tablet?
author: BudgetShopper
answerText: If it is literally just for reading text, an Amazon Fire tablet is totally fine and saves you hundreds of dollars.

question: I want to buy my dad a tablet just for reading the morning news. iPad or a cheap Amazon tablet?
author: TechDad
answerText: In my experience, cheap tablets have awful screens. Reading on them hurts your eyes. Check out refurbished iPads on [Apple](https://www.apple.com/).

question: Why does my work chat always send me notifications even when I set my status to away?
author: TiredWorker
answerText: You probably have your settings on mobile pushing notifications anyway. You have to tell the app on your phone to pause notifications too.

question: I have been staring at this error message for two hours. It says syntax error but everything looks right!
author: EagleEye
answerText: A syntax error usually means you forgot a tiny symbol, like a comma, a bracket, or a colon at the end of a line. Check the line directly above where the error is pointing!

question: I have been staring at this error message for two hours. It says syntax error but everything looks right!
author: CodeHelper
answerText: Try copying the exact error message and pasting it into Google. I guarantee someone else had the exact same problem.

question: I actually do not care if big companies have my data. I like getting ads for things I want. Is that wrong?
author: PrivacyNerd
answerText: It is your choice! The problem is not just ads, it is that if they get hacked, your personal information like your home address could be stolen by criminals.

question: I actually do not care if big companies have my data. I like getting ads for things I want. Is that wrong?
author: ChillUser
answerText: I am exactly like you. I would rather see an ad for a cool video game than an ad for adult diapers. I do not mind the tracking.

question: Infinite scrolling is the worst thing to happen to the internet. I miss pages with numbers at the bottom.
author: MindfulSurfer
answerText: Yes! Infinite scroll is designed to trap you and keep you looking at the screen forever. Pages gave you a natural stopping point.

question: Infinite scrolling is the worst thing to happen to the internet. I miss pages with numbers at the bottom.
author: LazyScroller
answerText: I actually love it. Clicking next page is annoying, especially on a phone. Just swiping up is so much easier.

question: My phone battery dies by two in the afternoon every single day and it is only a year old. Why?
author: BatterySaver
answerText: Go to your battery settings and see what app is eating the power. Usually it is a social media app running in the background.

question: My phone battery dies by two in the afternoon every single day and it is only a year old. Why?
author: ScreenBright
answerText: Check your screen brightness! If you leave it on maximum all day, it drains the battery incredibly fast.

question: My teacher uses an AI checker for homework. I wrote my paper myself but I am scared it will flag me as fake.
author: StudentLife
answerText: I recommend saving your work history. If you type in Google Docs, it saves every edit you make. You can show that to your teacher as proof.

question: My teacher uses an AI checker for homework. I wrote my paper myself but I am scared it will flag me as fake.
author: TechTeacher
answerText: Actually, most of those checking tools are very inaccurate. You can read an article about how they fail often on [The Verge](https://www.theverge.com/). Just be honest and show your rough drafts.

question: Do normal people actually use Trello for their personal lives? It looks like it is just for office project managers.
author: OrganizedMess
answerText: I use it for planning vacations! I make a column for places to eat, things to do, and hotels. It is super visual.

question: Do normal people actually use Trello for their personal lives? It looks like it is just for office project managers.
author: SimpleLife
answerText: I think it is overkill for daily chores, but it is great if you are moving to a new house and have a hundred things to track.

question: What actually happens when a website goes down? Like, where did it go?
author: ServerAdmin
answerText: A website is just a bunch of files sitting on a computer in a big warehouse. If that computer loses power or gets too crowded, it cannot send the files to your phone.

question: What actually happens when a website goes down? Like, where did it go?
author: TechieMom
answerText: Think of it like a restaurant. If the kitchen catches on fire, they lock the front doors. The building is still there, but you cannot get any food.

question: I hate that I have to make an account just to read a single news article online. Why do they do this?
author: NewsJunkie
answerText: They want your email address so they can send you newsletters and eventually try to make you pay for a subscription.

question: I hate that I have to make an account just to read a single news article online. Why do they do this?
author: BypassTrick
answerText: Sometimes if you use reader mode on your web browser, it hides the popup so you can read the text anyway. Give it a try!

question: Mechanical keyboards are way too loud and annoying. Why do people pay so much money for them?
author: TypingFan
answerText: They feel amazing to type on. It gives you physical feedback so you know you hit the key. You can actually buy quiet switches for them!

question: Mechanical keyboards are way too loud and annoying. Why do people pay so much money for them?
author: GamerGirl
answerText: I totally agree. My roommate has one and it sounds like a machine gun when they play games at night.

question: AI art looks entirely soulless and weird to me. People keep posting it and I can always tell it is fake.
author: ArtLover
answerText: The hands are always the giveaway! The fingers always blend together into a creepy mess.

question: AI art looks entirely soulless and weird to me. People keep posting it and I can always tell it is fake.
author: FutureTech
answerText: It is getting better very quickly though. Right now you can tell, but in a year or two, we might not be able to see the difference at all.

question: What is the best calendar app that works perfectly on both a Mac and a Windows computer?
author: CalendarKing
answerText: Just use Google Calendar. It runs in your web browser, so it does not matter what kind of computer or phone you are using.

question: What is the best calendar app that works perfectly on both a Mac and a Windows computer?
author: AppHunter
answerText: Check out [TickTick](https://ticktick.com/). It has great apps for both Windows and Mac and combines your calendar with your daily to-do list.

question: Why do pop-ups ask for my email the very second I open a store website? It makes me want to leave immediately.
author: MarketingPro
answerText: They do it because, sadly, it actually works. A lot of people will type their email to get a ten percent discount right away.

question: Why do pop-ups ask for my email the very second I open a store website? It makes me want to leave immediately.
author: AngryShopper
answerText: I leave immediately too! If I have not even seen your products yet, why would I give you my personal email?

question: I accidentally uploaded a file with my email password to a public site. Am I going to get hacked right now?
author: SecurityExpert
answerText: Go change your password this exact second. There are automated bots that scan public files for passwords all day long. Assume they already saw it.

question: I accidentally uploaded a file with my email password to a public site. Am I going to get hacked right now?
author: PanicHelper
answerText: Change the password immediately, and make sure you turn on two-step verification where they text your phone a code.

question: Does anyone actually need 32 gigabytes of memory for a normal computer, or is the store trying to trick me?
author: TechSaver
answerText: Unless you are editing giant 4K videos or playing crazy heavy video games, you absolutely do not need that much. 16 gigabytes is perfect for normal use.

question: Does anyone actually need 32 gigabytes of memory for a normal computer, or is the store trying to trick me?
author: SalesHater
answerText: They are trying to upsell you so they make more money. Save your cash and buy a bigger hard drive for storing photos instead.

question: How do I know if an email from my bank is actually real or if it is a scam trying to trick me?
author: SafeBanker
answerText: Never click the link in the email. Just open your web browser, type in your bank website yourself, and log in. If there is a real problem, you will see an alert there.

question: How do I know if an email from my bank is actually real or if it is a scam trying to trick me?
author: DetailChecker
answerText: Look at the email address it came from very closely. Sometimes it will say Chase Bank but the email address is actually random letters from a weird website.

question: Too many productivity apps actually make you less productive because you waste time checking them.
author: FocusMaster
answerText: I could not agree more. Every time you switch between apps, you lose your focus. I dropped all apps and just use sticky notes now.

question: Too many productivity apps actually make you less productive because you waste time checking them.
author: ToolLover
answerText: The trick is to just pick one tool and stick to it. Do not try a new app every week. You can learn more about focusing on [Zen Habits](https://zenhabits.net/).

question: I just opened a new design app and there are way too many buttons. Where do I even click first without messing up?
author: DesignTutor
answerText: Just look for the big button that says Frame or Artboard. That gives you a blank white box to start putting shapes into. Ignore everything else for now.

question: ChatGPT keeps giving me completely fake links when I ask it to find articles for me. Why is it lying?
author: AI_Expert
answerText: It does not actually search the live internet most of the time. It tries to guess what a link should look like based on words, so it makes them up. This is called a hallucination.

question: ChatGPT keeps giving me completely fake links when I ask it to find articles for me. Why is it lying?
author: ResearchPro
answerText: Never use it for web links! If you need real articles, try using [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) instead.

question: Why do programmers care so much about using tabs versus using spaces? It seems so silly to fight over.
author: CodeHistorian
answerText: It is mostly an old joke now, but spaces ensure the code looks exactly the same on every single computer screen. Tabs can look wider or thinner depending on the screen.

question: Why do programmers care so much about using tabs versus using spaces? It seems so silly to fight over.
author: TabsForLife
answerText: Tabs save file space! One tab is one character, but spaces are four characters. Also, you only have to press the button once.

question: Why do home printers still suck so much? It always says offline when I just want to print one single page.
author: AngryPrinter
answerText: Because they make them as cheap as possible so they can overcharge you for the ink later. The Wi-Fi chips inside them are terrible.

question: Why do home printers still suck so much? It always says offline when I just want to print one single page.
author: LaserFan
answerText: Stop buying cheap ink printers! Get a black and white laser printer from a brand like Brother. They never break and the powder never dries out.

question: I lost my phone and my authentication app was on it. Am I locked out of my accounts forever?
author: TechRescue
answerText: When you first set up those apps, they usually give you backup codes to print out or save. If you saved those, you can use them to get back in!

question: I lost my phone and my authentication app was on it. Am I locked out of my accounts forever?
author: SupportCaller
answerText: If you do not have backup codes, you will have to email the support team for each website. It takes a few days, but they can usually verify who you are and let you back in.

question: Should I put a piece of tape over my laptop camera? I see people do it but it looks so ugly.
author: SafeWeb
answerText: Honestly, yes. If someone hacks your computer, they can turn on the camera without the little green light showing up. Tape is the cheapest security you can buy.

question: Should I put a piece of tape over my laptop camera? I see people do it but it looks so ugly.
author: TechMinimalist
answerText: You can buy little plastic sliding covers on Amazon that look much cleaner than tape. They just slide open when you need a video call.

question: What does UX even mean? Isn't it just making things look pretty with nice colors?
author: UX_Designer
answerText: UI is making it look pretty. UX stands for User Experience, which is how easy it feels to use. If a door looks beautiful but you do not know whether to push or pull, it has bad UX.

question: Curved monitors are a total gimmick and just look weird on a desk. Tell me I am wrong.
author: ScreenJunkie
answerText: They are amazing if you have a massive screen! Because the screen wraps around your head, the edges are closer to your eyes, so you do not have to turn your neck as much.

question: Curved monitors are a total gimmick and just look weird on a desk. Tell me I am wrong.
author: OfficeGuy
answerText: I agree with you for small screens. Anything under 30 inches does not need a curve. It is just silly.

question: Is math actually important for coding? I am terrible at math but I want to build websites.
author: WebDev
answerText: For building normal websites? Absolutely not. You just need to know basic adding and subtracting. It is more about logic and organizing things like a puzzle.

question: Is math actually important for coding? I am terrible at math but I want to build websites.
author: GameMaker
answerText: It depends on what you build. If you want to make 3D video games or artificial intelligence, you need a lot of math. If you want to make a blog, you need zero math.

question: Why is everyone so obsessed with the Pomodoro timer thing? It is just a kitchen clock.
author: FocusFan
answerText: It is because twenty five minutes feels very easy to do. When you feel lazy, telling yourself to just work for twenty minutes tricks your brain into starting.

question: Why is everyone so obsessed with the Pomodoro timer thing? It is just a kitchen clock.
author: BurnoutHater
answerText: The most important part is the mandatory break. It stops you from staring at a screen for four hours straight so you do not get a headache.

question: I use the same password for everything but I change the last number. Is that bad?
author: SecAdmin
answerText: Yes, very bad! Hackers know people do this. If they find out your password is Apple1, their automated tools will automatically try Apple2 and Apple3.

question: I bought a new graphics card for gaming and it literally does not fit inside my computer case. What do I do?
author: PCBuilder
answerText: You only have two options. You can return the card and measure your case to buy a smaller one, or you can buy a completely new computer case and move all your parts over.

question: I bought a new graphics card for gaming and it literally does not fit inside my computer case. What do I do?
author: MeasureTwice
answerText: You can use a site like [PC Part Picker](https://pcpartpicker.com/) next time! It checks the physical sizes of everything and warns you if they will not fit together.

question: Will learning to use AI make me lazy? I feel like I am cheating when I use it to write cover letters.
author: JobSeeker
answerText: Think of it like using a calculator. It is a tool to help you skip the boring parts so you can focus on making the letter sound like your actual personality.

question: Will learning to use AI make me lazy? I feel like I am cheating when I use it to write cover letters.
author: OldTimer
answerText: If you copy and paste it without reading it, yes, that is lazy. But if you use it to get past writers block and then rewrite it yourself, it is just smart.

question: Why do all websites look exactly the same now? It is just big pictures and large text everywhere.
author: Dave123
answerText: I think it is because most people use phones now. Big text and pictures are much easier to tap on a small screen.

question: Why do all websites look exactly the same now? It is just big pictures and large text everywhere.
author: WebFan
answerText: A lot of people just use website builders like [Squarespace](https://www.squarespace.com/) which give everyone the exact same basic templates.

question: Why do all websites look exactly the same now? It is just big pictures and large text everywhere.
author: DesignNerd
answerText: It is actually about making things easy to read quickly. When websites look similar, people do not have to learn how to use them every single time.

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost. Where do I actually start without getting confused?
author: CodeNewbie
answerText: I was stuck too! I highly recommend [Codecademy](https://www.codecademy.com/). It lets you type code right in your web browser so you do not have to install anything complicated.

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost. Where do I actually start without getting confused?
author: PythonPro
answerText: Start by trying to fix one small problem in your daily life. Do not try to build a huge video game on day one.

question: I am trying to learn Python but I am so lost. Where do I actually start without getting confused?
author: SarahJ
answerText: Check this out: YouTube has amazing free videos. Just search for Python for absolute beginners. Watching someone else do it really helps.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
author: PaperLover
answerText: Honestly, no. A plain paper notebook never runs out of battery and it does not distract you with internet notifications.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
author: NotionFan
answerText: It depends on what you need! I use [Notion](https://www.notion.so/) because I can search for words easily. You cannot use a search bar on a piece of paper.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
author: BusyMom
answerText: I tried it and gave up. It felt like I was spending more time organizing my tasks than actually doing them.

question: Is Notion actually better than just using a simple paper notebook? It looks like too much work.
author: TechStudent
answerText: In my experience, it is great if you use a free template someone else already made. Do not build it from scratch.

question: My budget is 50 dollars. What is the absolute best computer mouse I can get for my office job?
author: MouseGuy
answerText: I recommend the Logitech M720. It is usually under 50 dollars and you can connect it to different computers with one button.

question: My budget is 50 dollars. What is the absolute best computer mouse I can get for my office job?
author: OfficeWorker
answerText: Actually, just get a basic wired mouse. They never die, never need batteries, and cost like 10 bucks on [Amazon](https://www.amazon.com/).

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
author: TechTruth
answerText: In my experience, they are not actually recording your voice. They just track what you search for and where you travel. It is creepy but they are not listening to your actual words.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
author: PrivacyFirst
answerText: You can turn off microphone access for apps in your phone settings if you are worried! It helps give you some peace of mind.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
author: AdGuy
answerText: It is usually just a coincidence. You probably searched for something similar recently or your friend searched for it while you were on the same Wi-Fi.

question: Should I really be worried about my phone listening to me? I talked about shoes and now I see shoe ads everywhere.
author: SafeWeb
answerText: If you want to stop the ads, check out the [Brave Browser](https://brave.com/). It blocks a lot of those creepy trackers automatically.

question: Why do websites hide the menu behind those three little horizontal lines? I can never find anything.
author: PhoneUser
answerText: That is called a hamburger menu! Designers use it to save space on small screens so the page does not look messy.

question: Why do websites hide the menu behind those three little horizontal lines? I can never find anything.
author: OldSchool
answerText: I hate it too. I prefer when all the buttons are just at the top of the page so I know exactly where to click.

question: I spilled a whole glass of water on my laptop keyboard. I turned it off. What do I do right now?!
author: FixItFelix
answerText: Keep it turned off! Do not turn it on to check if it works. Unplug it and lay it open face down on a towel for at least two days.

question: I spilled a whole glass of water on my laptop keyboard. I turned it off. What do I do right now?!
author: TechSupport
answerText: If you can easily take the battery out, do that immediately. But most new laptops do not let you do that, so just let it dry completely.

question: I spilled a whole glass of water on my laptop keyboard. I turned it off. What do I do right now?!
author: RiceMyth
answerText: Whatever you do, do not put it in rice! Rice dust can get inside and ruin the fans. You can read why on [iFixit](https://www.ifixit.com/).

question: I have 500 unread emails and the number keeps growing. How do I fix this without deleting everything?
author: InboxZero
answerText: Search for the word unsubscribe and delete all those automatic emails first. That will clear out half of your inbox right away.

question: I have 500 unread emails and the number keeps growing. How do I fix this without deleting everything?
author: BusyWorker
answerText: I recommend putting all of your older emails into a folder called Archive. They are not deleted, so you can still search for them later, but your main screen will be clean.

question: I have 500 unread emails and the number keeps growing. How do I fix this without deleting everything?
author: LazyGenius
answerText: Honestly, just ignore the number. If it is really important, the person will email you again.

question: What is the best programming language to learn if I want to make a simple iPhone game?
author: GameDev
answerText: If you only want it on iPhone, look into Swift. It is made by Apple specifically for their phones.

question: What is the best programming language to learn if I want to make a simple iPhone game?
author: UnityFan
answerText: I highly recommend using [Unity](https://unity.com/). You learn C# with it, and it lets you put your game on iPhone and Android at the same time.

question: I clicked a link in a random text message about a package delivery. Did I just ruin my phone?
author: SecurityPro
answerText: If you just clicked the link but did not type in any passwords or download anything, you are probably fine. Just close the page.

question: I clicked a link in a random text message about a package delivery. Did I just ruin my phone?
author: ScamHater
answerText: Never put your credit card info into those sites! That is how they steal your money. They trick you into paying a tiny delivery fee.

question: How does an AI actually generate a picture from just a few words? It feels like magic.
author: AI_Nerd
answerText: It looked at millions of pictures on the internet and learned what things look like. When you say cat, it remembers the pattern of a cat from all those photos.

question: How does an AI actually generate a picture from just a few words? It feels like magic.
author: SimpleScience
answerText: Think of it like a very fast artist who has memorized every drawing in the world and tries to blend them together based on your instructions.

question: Dark mode is actually terrible for reading long articles. Am I the only one who thinks this?
author: SammyG
answerText: I completely agree! My eyes hurt so much when reading bright white text on a super black background.

question: Dark mode is actually terrible for reading long articles. Am I the only one who thinks this?
author: TechFan
answerText: Actually, dark mode saves battery on newer phone screens. But yes, it can make you squint if you read for too long.

question: Dark mode is actually terrible for reading long articles. Am I the only one who thinks this?
author: DesignPro
answerText: It is all about the gray tones. Good dark mode uses dark gray, not pure black. Check out the [Material Design Guide](https://m3.material.io/) to see how they fix this.

question: What is the difference between a cheap 5 dollar TV cable and an expensive 50 dollar one?
author: TVGuy
answerText: For regular digital cables like HDMI, there is absolutely no difference in picture quality. It either works or it does not. Save your money.

question: What is the difference between a cheap 5 dollar TV cable and an expensive 50 dollar one?
author: GamerDude
answerText: In my experience, the only difference is how strong the cord is. Cheap ones might break if you bend them too much, but the picture is the exact same.

question: I need a simple app to share a grocery list with my wife. What do you all use?
author: FamilyMan
answerText: We just use the Notes app that comes on the iPhone. You can share it and both people can check things off.

question: I need a simple app to share a grocery list with my wife. What do you all use?
author: ListLover
answerText: I recommend [AnyList](https://www.anylist.com/). It automatically sorts your food into categories like dairy and produce so you walk through the store faster.

question: I need a simple app to share a grocery list with my wife. What do you all use?
author: GoogleFan
answerText: Google Keep is amazing for this. It is totally free and works even if one of you has an Android and the other has an iPhone.

question: Learning to code is a total waste of time now that AI can write it for you. Right?
author: CodeVeteran
answerText: Not at all. AI is like a fancy calculator. It can do the math, but you still need to know what numbers to type in to get the right answer.

question: Learning to code is a total waste of time now that AI can write it for you. Right?
author: TechRealist
answerText: AI makes a lot of mistakes. If you do not know how to code, you will not know how to fix the broken code it gives you.

question: What is the easiest password manager for someone who is terrible with computers?
author: SafeTech
answerText: I recommend [Bitwarden](https://bitwarden.com/). It is free, very secure, and works on your phone and computer without being confusing.

question: What is the easiest password manager for someone who is terrible with computers?
author: AppleUser
answerText: If you only use Apple devices, just use the built-in iCloud Keychain. It saves everything automatically and you just use your fingerprint or face to log in.

question: I have to build a website for my mom's bakery by Friday and I have no clue where to start. Help!
author: HelpfulDesigner
answerText: Do not panic! Use a template. Just get [Wix](https://www.wix.com/), pick a food template, change the words, and add some nice photos of her bread.

question: I have to build a website for my mom's bakery by Friday and I have no clue where to start. Help!
author: BizOwner
answerText: Honestly, a lot of small shops just use a Facebook page or Instagram now instead of a full website. It is much faster to set up.

question: I want to use AI to help me write better business emails. Is there a free tool that is good?
author: EmailPro
answerText: Just use the free version of ChatGPT! You can paste your messy thoughts and ask it to make it sound professional.

question: I want to use AI to help me write better business emails. Is there a free tool that is good?
author: GrammarFan
answerText: I highly recommend [Grammarly](https://www.grammarly.com/). It fixes your spelling and tone right inside your email window without you having to open a new tab.

question: I want to buy my dad a tablet just for reading the morning news. iPad or a cheap Amazon tablet?
author: Daughter22
answerText: Get an iPad if you can afford it. It will last five times longer without getting slow, and it is much easier for older folks to use.

question: I want to buy my dad a tablet just for reading the morning news. iPad or a cheap Amazon tablet?
author: BudgetShopper
answerText: If it is literally just for reading text, an Amazon Fire tablet is totally fine and saves you hundreds of dollars.

question: I want to buy my dad a tablet just for reading the morning news. iPad or a cheap Amazon tablet?
author: TechDad
answerText: In my experience, cheap tablets have awful screens. Reading on them hurts your eyes. Check out refurbished iPads on [Apple](https://www.apple.com/).

question: Why does my work chat always send me notifications even when I set my status to away?
author: TiredWorker
answerText: You probably have your settings on mobile pushing notifications anyway. You have to tell the app on your phone to pause notifications too.

question: I have been staring at this error message for two hours. It says syntax error but everything looks right!
author: EagleEye
answerText: A syntax error usually means you forgot a tiny symbol, like a comma, a bracket, or a colon at the end of a line. Check the line directly above where the error is pointing!

question: I have been staring at this error message for two hours. It says syntax error but everything looks right!
author: CodeHelper
answerText: Try copying the exact error message and pasting it into Google. I guarantee someone else had the exact same problem.

question: I actually do not care if big companies have my data. I like getting ads for things I want. Is that wrong?
author: PrivacyNerd
answerText: It is your choice! The problem is not just ads, it is that if they get hacked, your personal information like your home address could be stolen by criminals.

question: I actually do not care if big companies have my data. I like getting ads for things I want. Is that wrong?
author: ChillUser
answerText: I am exactly like you. I would rather see an ad for a cool video game than an ad for adult diapers. I do not mind the tracking.

question: Infinite scrolling is the worst thing to happen to the internet. I miss pages with numbers at the bottom.
author: MindfulSurfer
answerText: Yes! Infinite scroll is designed to trap you and keep you looking at the screen forever. Pages gave you a natural stopping point.

question: Infinite scrolling is the worst thing to happen to the internet. I miss pages with numbers at the bottom.
author: LazyScroller
answerText: I actually love it. Clicking next page is annoying, especially on a phone. Just swiping up is so much easier.

question: My phone battery dies by two in the afternoon every single day and it is only a year old. Why?
author: BatterySaver
answerText: Go to your battery settings and see what app is eating the power. Usually it is a social media app running in the background.

question: My phone battery dies by two in the afternoon every single day and it is only a year old. Why?
author: ScreenBright
answerText: Check your screen brightness! If you leave it on maximum all day, it drains the battery incredibly fast.

question: My teacher uses an AI checker for homework. I wrote my paper myself but I am scared it will flag me as fake.
author: StudentLife
answerText: I recommend saving your work history. If you type in Google Docs, it saves every edit you make. You can show that to your teacher as proof.

question: My teacher uses an AI checker for homework. I wrote my paper myself but I am scared it will flag me as fake.
author: TechTeacher
answerText: Actually, most of those checking tools are very inaccurate. You can read an article about how they fail often on [The Verge](https://www.theverge.com/). Just be honest and show your rough drafts.

question: Do normal people actually use Trello for their personal lives? It looks like it is just for office project managers.
author: OrganizedMess
answerText: I use it for planning vacations! I make a column for places to eat, things to do, and hotels. It is super visual.

question: Do normal people actually use Trello for their personal lives? It looks like it is just for office project managers.
author: SimpleLife
answerText: I think it is overkill for daily chores, but it is great if you are moving to a new house and have a hundred things to track.

question: What actually happens when a website goes down? Like, where did it go?
author: ServerAdmin
answerText: A website is just a bunch of files sitting on a computer in a big warehouse. If that computer loses power or gets too crowded, it cannot send the files to your phone.

question: What actually happens when a website goes down? Like, where did it go?
author: TechieMom
answerText: Think of it like a restaurant. If the kitchen catches on fire, they lock the front doors. The building is still there, but you cannot get any food.

question: I hate that I have to make an account just to read a single news article online. Why do they do this?
author: NewsJunkie
answerText: They want your email address so they can send you newsletters and eventually try to make you pay for a subscription.

question: I hate that I have to make an account just to read a single news article online. Why do they do this?
author: BypassTrick
answerText: Sometimes if you use reader mode on your web browser, it hides the popup so you can read the text anyway. Give it a try!

question: Mechanical keyboards are way too loud and annoying. Why do people pay so much money for them?
author: TypingFan
answerText: They feel amazing to type on. It gives you physical feedback so you know you hit the key. You can actually buy quiet switches for them!

question: Mechanical keyboards are way too loud and annoying. Why do people pay so much money for them?
author: GamerGirl
answerText: I totally agree. My roommate has one and it sounds like a machine gun when they play games at night.

question: AI art looks entirely soulless and weird to me. People keep posting it and I can always tell it is fake.
author: ArtLover
answerText: The hands are always the giveaway! The fingers always blend together into a creepy mess.

question: AI art looks entirely soulless and weird to me. People keep posting it and I can always tell it is fake.
author: FutureTech
answerText: It is getting better very quickly though. Right now you can tell, but in a year or two, we might not be able to see the difference at all.

question: What is the best calendar app that works perfectly on both a Mac and a Windows computer?
author: CalendarKing
answerText: Just use Google Calendar. It runs in your web browser, so it does not matter what kind of computer or phone you are using.

question: What is the best calendar app that works perfectly on both a Mac and a Windows computer?
author: AppHunter
answerText: Check out [TickTick](https://ticktick.com/). It has great apps for both Windows and Mac and combines your calendar with your daily to-do list.

question: Why do pop-ups ask for my email the very second I open a store website? It makes me want to leave immediately.
author: MarketingPro
answerText: They do it because, sadly, it actually works. A lot of people will type their email to get a ten percent discount right away.

question: Why do pop-ups ask for my email the very second I open a store website? It makes me want to leave immediately.
author: AngryShopper
answerText: I leave immediately too! If I have not even seen your products yet, why would I give you my personal email?

question: I accidentally uploaded a file with my email password to a public site. Am I going to get hacked right now?
author: SecurityExpert
answerText: Go change your password this exact second. There are automated bots that scan public files for passwords all day long. Assume they already saw it.

question: I accidentally uploaded a file with my email password to a public site. Am I going to get hacked right now?
author: PanicHelper
answerText: Change the password immediately, and make sure you turn on two-step verification where they text your phone a code.

question: Does anyone actually need 32 gigabytes of memory for a normal computer, or is the store trying to trick me?
author: TechSaver
answerText: Unless you are editing giant 4K videos or playing crazy heavy video games, you absolutely do not need that much. 16 gigabytes is perfect for normal use.

question: Does anyone actually need 32 gigabytes of memory for a normal computer, or is the store trying to trick me?
author: SalesHater
answerText: They are trying to upsell you so they make more money. Save your cash and buy a bigger hard drive for storing photos instead.

question: How do I know if an email from my bank is actually real or if it is a scam trying to trick me?
author: SafeBanker
answerText: Never click the link in the email. Just open your web browser, type in your bank website yourself, and log in. If there is a real problem, you will see an alert there.

question: How do I know if an email from my bank is actually real or if it is a scam trying to trick me?
author: DetailChecker
answerText: Look at the email address it came from very closely. Sometimes it will say Chase Bank but the email address is actually random letters from a weird website.

question: Too many productivity apps actually make you less productive because you waste time checking them.
author: FocusMaster
answerText: I could not agree more. Every time you switch between apps, you lose your focus. I dropped all apps and just use sticky notes now.

question: Too many productivity apps actually make you less productive because you waste time checking them.
author: ToolLover
answerText: The trick is to just pick one tool and stick to it. Do not try a new app every week. You can learn more about focusing on [Zen Habits](https://zenhabits.net/).

question: I just opened a new design app and there are way too many buttons. Where do I even click first without messing up?
author: DesignTutor
answerText: Just look for the big button that says Frame or Artboard. That gives you a blank white box to start putting shapes into. Ignore everything else for now.

question: ChatGPT keeps giving me completely fake links when I ask it to find articles for me. Why is it lying?
author: AI_Expert
answerText: It does not actually search the live internet most of the time. It tries to guess what a link should look like based on words, so it makes them up. This is called a hallucination.

question: ChatGPT keeps giving me completely fake links when I ask it to find articles for me. Why is it lying?
author: ResearchPro
answerText: Never use it for web links! If you need real articles, try using [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) instead.

question: Why do programmers care so much about using tabs versus using spaces? It seems so silly to fight over.
author: CodeHistorian
answerText: It is mostly an old joke now, but spaces ensure the code looks exactly the same on every single computer screen. Tabs can look wider or thinner depending on the screen.

question: Why do programmers care so much about using tabs versus using spaces? It seems so silly to fight over.
author: TabsForLife
answerText: Tabs save file space! One tab is one character, but spaces are four characters. Also, you only have to press the button once.

question: Why do home printers still suck so much? It always says offline when I just want to print one single page.
author: AngryPrinter
answerText: Because they make them as cheap as possible so they can overcharge you for the ink later. The Wi-Fi chips inside them are terrible.

question: Why do home printers still suck so much? It always says offline when I just want to print one single page.
author: LaserFan
answerText: Stop buying cheap ink printers! Get a black and white laser printer from a brand like Brother. They never break and the powder never dries out.

question: I lost my phone and my authentication app was on it. Am I locked out of my accounts forever?
author: TechRescue
answerText: When you first set up those apps, they usually give you backup codes to print out or save. If you saved those, you can use them to get back in!

question: I lost my phone and my authentication app was on it. Am I locked out of my accounts forever?
author: SupportCaller
answerText: If you do not have backup codes, you will have to email the support team for each website. It takes a few days, but they can usually verify who you are and let you back in.

question: Should I put a piece of tape over my laptop camera? I see people do it but it looks so ugly.
author: SafeWeb
answerText: Honestly, yes. If someone hacks your computer, they can turn on the camera without the little green light showing up. Tape is the cheapest security you can buy.

question: Should I put a piece of tape over my laptop camera? I see people do it but it looks so ugly.
author: TechMinimalist
answerText: You can buy little plastic sliding covers on Amazon that look much cleaner than tape. They just slide open when you need a video call.

question: What does UX even mean? Isn't it just making things look pretty with nice colors?
author: UX_Designer
answerText: UI is making it look pretty. UX stands for User Experience, which is how easy it feels to use. If a door looks beautiful but you do not know whether to push or pull, it has bad UX.

question: Curved monitors are a total gimmick and just look weird on a desk. Tell me I am wrong.
author: ScreenJunkie
answerText: They are amazing if you have a massive screen! Because the screen wraps around your head, the edges are closer to your eyes, so you do not have to turn your neck as much.

question: Curved monitors are a total gimmick and just look weird on a desk. Tell me I am wrong.
author: OfficeGuy
answerText: I agree with you for small screens. Anything under 30 inches does not need a curve. It is just silly.

question: Is math actually important for coding? I am terrible at math but I want to build websites.
author: WebDev
answerText: For building normal websites? Absolutely not. You just need to know basic adding and subtracting. It is more about logic and organizing things like a puzzle.

question: Is math actually important for coding? I am terrible at math but I want to build websites.
author: GameMaker
answerText: It depends on what you build. If you want to make 3D video games or artificial intelligence, you need a lot of math. If you want to make a blog, you need zero math.

question: Why is everyone so obsessed with the Pomodoro timer thing? It is just a kitchen clock.
author: FocusFan
answerText: It is because twenty five minutes feels very easy to do. When you feel lazy, telling yourself to just work for twenty minutes tricks your brain into starting.

question: Why is everyone so obsessed with the Pomodoro timer thing? It is just a kitchen clock.
author: BurnoutHater
answerText: The most important part is the mandatory break. It stops you from staring at a screen for four hours straight so you do not get a headache.

question: I use the same password for everything but I change the last number. Is that bad?
author: SecAdmin
answerText: Yes, very bad! Hackers know people do this. If they find out your password is Apple1, their automated tools will automatically try Apple2 and Apple3.

question: I bought a new graphics card for gaming and it literally does not fit inside my computer case. What do I do?
author: PCBuilder
answerText: You only have two options. You can return the card and measure your case to buy a smaller one, or you can buy a completely new computer case and move all your parts over.

question: I bought a new graphics card for gaming and it literally does not fit inside my computer case. What do I do?
author: MeasureTwice
answerText: You can use a site like [PC Part Picker](https://pcpartpicker.com/) next time! It checks the physical sizes of everything and warns you if they will not fit together.

question: Will learning to use AI make me lazy? I feel like I am cheating when I use it to write cover letters.
author: JobSeeker
answerText: Think of it like using a calculator. It is a tool to help you skip the boring parts so you can focus on making the letter sound like your actual personality.

question: Will learning to use AI make me lazy? I feel like I am cheating when I use it to write cover letters.
author: OldTimer
answerText: If you copy and paste it without reading it, yes, that is lazy. But if you use it to get past writers block and then rewrite it yourself, it is just smart.
